affected_pattern: Cohort of enterprise customers shows missing TotalCharges after a DST transition
root_cause: DST-driven timestamp rollback — during fall-back, billing records with timestamps within the repeated hour were deduplicated incorrectly by a time-based primary key, and the second occurrence was dropped as a 'duplicate'.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: DST-Ambiguous Timestamp pattern
Primary-key uniqueness violations in the mediation DB at 01:00 local
IBM Telco Billing Operations Standards Section on UTC-only timestamps cited as mitigation
recommended_action: Migrate billing record timestamps to UTC with a separate local-time field
Replay the ambiguous-hour billing records from the network element buffer
Rewrite the dedup key to include a monotonic sequence ID
Add a DST-transition dry-run to the bi-annual change calendar
